summary: Frontend testing completed for Agent Finder Wizard redesign. All 8 requested features verified successfully: 1) Homepage search for 'Japan' shows visa card with blue 'Explore' button (bg-blue-600), 2) Click 'Explore' opens Agent Finder Wizard, 3) Wizard header shows 'Japan' centered with tourist photo background and blue overlay, 4) Left panel (20%) shows 5 vertical steps that highlight as user progresses, 5) Right panel (80%) shows agent cards with all required info, 6) Select agent and click Continue moves to step 2, 7) Steps panel updates to show step 2 highlighted, 8) Successfully navigated through all 5 steps.
passed_tests: Homepage search for 'Japan' shows visa card with blue 'Explore' button (bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700)
Click 'Explore' button opens Agent Finder Wizard modal
Wizard header shows 'Japan' centered with tourist photo background (from COUNTRY_IMAGES) and blue overlay (rgba(30, 64, 175, 0.85))
Left panel (20% width - md:w-1/5) shows 5 vertical steps: Select Agent, Your Details, Connect, Application, Track
Step 1 'Select Agent' is highlighted in blue (bg-blue-600) when active

Right panel (80% - flex-1) shows agent cards with: logo (ui-avatars.com), name, location with MapPin, experience, Google rating in green box (bg-green-50), visa fee, govt fee, processing time, total in blue (text-blue-600)
Agent cards show correct data: VisaExperts India (Delhi, 8 Years, 4.8 rating, ₹4,500 + ₹2,500 = ₹7,000)
Select agent and click Continue moves to step 2 'Your Details'
Steps panel updates - step 1 shows checkmark, step 2 highlighted in blue
Step indicator shows 'Step 2 of 5' in footer
Successfully navigated through all 5 steps (Select Agent → Your Details → Connect → Application → Track)
Final step shows 'Application Submitted!' with Application Summary (Destination, Agent, Processing Time, Total Fee)
Done button appears on final step
critical_code_review_comments: AgentFinderWizard.js correctly implements blue theme with bg-blue-600 for active steps and buttons
Header uses linear-gradient with rgba(30, 64, 175, 0.85) to rgba(30, 64, 175, 0.95) for blue overlay on country image
Layout correctly uses flex with md:w-1/5 (20%) for steps panel and flex-1 (80%) for content
Agent cards display all required info: logo, name, location, experience, Google rating (in green box), visa fee, govt fee, processing time, total (in blue)
Step progression works correctly with visual feedback (checkmarks for completed, blue highlight for active)
Explore button on homepage correctly styled with bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agent Finder Wizard redesign verified: 1) Blue theme throughout (bg-blue-600), 2) Header has country tourist image with blue overlay and centered country name, 3) 20-80 split layout with steps on left and content on right, 4) 5 vertical steps with active highlighting, 5) Agent cards show: logo, name, location, experience, Google rating (green box), visa fee, govt fee, processing time, total (blue). All step navigation working correctly.

wizard_header.background: Tourist photo with blue overlay (linear-gradient rgba(30, 64, 175, 0.85))

agent_cards.name: e.g., VisaExperts India
agent_cards.google_rating: in green box (bg-green-50) with star icon
